title: Dr. Colditz on Breast Cancer Prevention in Low and Middle ...
text:
foreign
going forward is to really focus our
efforts on breast cancer prevention
particularly for low and middle income
countries a quarter of all cancer
diagnosed in women at the moment is
breast cancer and that percentage will
go up as countries go through the
economic transition with fewer children
better nutrition earlier onset of
menstrual periods and we can't afford to
diagnose and pre breast cancer in Low
Middle income countries and it's one
area we don't currently have a robust
prevention focus and that certainly is
something I want to develop and
see implemented in my lifetime
